title: [IOS]Analytics - Feedback Opened
scenario: Feedback form (Mopinion) opened event logged as "feedback_opened" in Firebase within the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
3. Open the Feedback form (Mopinion) from within the app.
expected: The Firebase event "feedback_opened" is logged when the Feedback form is opened. Event counts update in Firebase after a few hours.
